overall_status: INVESTIGATIONAL / LATE-STAGE DEVELOPMENT — NO APPROVAL CLAIM MADE

regulatory_records.current_status: No FDA approval is claimed by CertiAura. Current public reporting describes retatrutide as investigational and discusses future regulatory submission / potential launch.
source_basis: Existing sponsor topline evidence preserved in CERT-EKS-000011
regulatory_records.source_closure_state: HIGH-QUALITY CURRENT CORROBORATION / DIRECT ASSET-SPECIFIC FDA APPROVAL RECORD NOT CAPTURED
regulatory_records.commercial_implication: Do not market, describe or sell retatrutide as FDA-approved.
regulatory_records.next_review_trigger: FDA submission, acceptance, advisory action, approval, rejection, safety action or other material regulatory development

regulatory_records.current_status: Asset-specific current classification has not been directly captured. Because retatrutide is an investigational pharmacologically active compound, athlete-facing use requires authoritative current WADA verification.
